requirement_topic.en: KC Battery Safety Certification — KC 62619 / KC 62133

summary.en: South Korea requires KC safety certification for lithium battery products that fall within the regulated scope. For BESS, industrial lithium secondary cells and batteries are commonly assessed against KC 62619, while portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries may be assessed against KC 62133 where that product scope applies. KC certification is compulsory where in scope; it is not a voluntary mark for regulated battery products.
summary.zh: 韩国对落入监管范围的锂电池产品要求KC安全认证。对于BESS，工业用锂二次电芯和电池通常按KC 62619评估；便携式密封锂二次电芯和电池在适用范围内可能按KC 62133评估。产品落入适用范围时，KC认证是强制性的，并非自愿标志。
summary.zht: 韓國對落入監管範圍的鋰電池產品要求KC安全認證。對於BESS，工業用鋰二次電芯和電池通常按KC 62619評估；便攜式密封鋰二次電芯和電池在適用範圍內可能按KC 62133評估。產品落入適用範圍時，KC認證是強制性的，並非自願標誌。

standards_or_laws: KC 62619 — Industrial lithium secondary cells and batteries
KC 62133 — Portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries
Electrical Appliances and Consumer Products Safety Control Act

summary.en: China uses GB 44240-2024 as the compulsory safety requirement for lithium-ion cells and batteries for electric energy storage, with GB/T 36276-2023 commonly used as a recommended technical standard for electric energy storage lithium-ion batteries. Chinese GB or GB/T reports do not replace Korean KC certification.
summary.zh: 中国以GB 44240-2024作为电力储能用锂离子电芯和电池的强制性安全要求，并通常采用GB/T 36276-2023作为电力储能用锂离子电池推荐性技术标准。中国GB或GB/T报告不能替代韩国KC认证。
summary.zht: 中國以GB 44240-2024作為電力儲能用鋰離子電芯和電池的強制性安全要求，並通常採用GB/T 36276-2023作為電力儲能用鋰離子電池推薦性技術標準。中國GB或GB/T報告不能替代韓國KC認證。

gap.en: The main gap is certification recognition and scope. KC is a Korean compulsory product-safety regime for regulated batteries, while Chinese GB evidence is domestic evidence only. Exporters must confirm whether the cell, module, rack, or integrated BESS is in KC scope, perform Korean-standard testing through an accepted route, prepare Korean marking and documentation, and avoid treating KC 62619 or KC 62133 as optional where the regulated scope applies.
gap.zh: 主要差距在认证认可和适用范围。KC是韩国对受监管电池的强制性产品安全制度，中国GB证据仅为中国国内证据。出口商须确认电芯、模组、电池架或集成BESS是否落入KC范围，通过可接受路径完成韩国标准测试，准备韩国标识和文件，并避免在受监管范围内将KC 62619或KC 62133视为自愿要求。
gap.zht: 主要差距在認證認可和適用範圍。KC是韓國對受監管電池的強制性產品安全制度，中國GB證據僅為中國國內證據。出口商須確認電芯、模組、電池架或整合BESS是否落入KC範圍，通過可接受路徑完成韓國標準測試，準備韓國標識和文件，並避免在受監管範圍內將KC 62619或KC 62133視為自願要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where in scope — KC 62619 / KC 62133 certification is compulsory for regulated battery products in South Korea
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic CN market under GB 44240-2024; GB/T 36276-2023 is recommended and commonly referenced

source.publisher: Korean Agency for Technology and Standards (KATS)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A Chinese GB 44240 or GB/T 36276 report does not satisfy Korean KC certification. If the battery product is in KC scope, obtain compulsory KC certification to KC 62619 and/or KC 62133 before Korean market placement.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB 44240或GB/T 36276报告不满足韩国KC认证要求。若电池产品落入KC范围，须在韩国投放市场前取得KC 62619和/或KC 62133强制认证。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB 44240或GB/T 36276報告不滿足韓國KC認證要求。若電池產品落入KC範圍，須在韓國投放市場前取得KC 62619和／或KC 62133強制認證。
